positive: A stylized, maximalist celestial map featuring a central, glowing nebula surrounded by various constellations, mythical sea creatures, and geometric celestial bodies. The main color palette should be deep sapphire blues, cosmic purples, and vibrant gold accents, with elements delineated by clean, thick lines. Incorporate stylized, elegant patterns like mandalas and sacred geometry seamlessly into the starry background. The style should be a blend of Art Deco elegance and neo-mysticism, resembling illuminated scientific diagrams mixed with Polynesian tattoo motifs. Composition must be highly centralized, symmetrical, and designed to look excellent as a repeating, isolated print on fabric. Strong contrast between the dark background and the luminous foreground elements. Clean silhouettes, perfect symmetry.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, noise, low detail, ugly, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cropped, grayscale, photorealistic, muddy colors
